debug_info.goal:
U : Type
A : Set U
a : U
h1 : a ∈ A
h2 : empty (A \ {a})
⊢ A = {a}

failed_attempts:
by
  apply ext
  intro x
  constructor
  · intro hxA
    by_contra hxne
    have hxnot : x ∉ {a} := by
      intro hx
      apply hxne
      exact hx.symm
    have hxmem : x ∈ A \ {a} := And.intro hxA hxnot
    exact (h2 x) hxmem
  · intro hx
    have : x = a := by
      simpa [Set.mem_singleton_iff] using hx
    simpa [this] using h1

by
  apply ext
  intro x
  apply Iff.intro
  · intro hxA
    have hx : x = a := by
      by_contra hxa
      have hxmem : x ∈ A \ {a} := by
        refine And.intro hxA ?_
        intro hxina
        exact hxa (by simpa [Set.mem_singleton_iff] using hxina)
      exact (h2 x) hxmem
    simpa [Set.mem_singleton_iff, hx]
  · intro hx
    have hx' : x = a := by simpa [Set.mem_singleton_iff] using hx
    simpa [hx'] using h1

    by_contra hx
    have hxmem : x ∈ A \ {a} := by

      apply hx
      exact hx'.symm

    have : x = a := by

    simpa [this] using h1
